---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for PartGraph
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

A clear, concise description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context

Links, mock-ups, or examples that clarify the request.
